welcomeDescription: Configure your API endpoint and brand settings to start analyzing customer feedback.

home.flowHint: Four steps, mirrored by the sections in the sidebar.
home.intro: Turn scattered customer feedback into product decisions. Bring feedback in from any source, let AI surface the themes, shape the findings into personas and specs, then validate and prioritize what to build next.
home.phase1Desc: Pull in customer feedback with web scrapers or embeddable forms, then browse the raw and processed records.
home.phase2Desc: See what customers are telling you — sentiment, categories, and the biggest problems surfaced automatically.
home.phase3Desc: Ask questions in plain language, then spin findings into research projects with personas, PRDs, and PR/FAQs.
home.phase4Desc: Confirm demand with targeted feedback forms, then rank what to build by frequency, severity, and reach.
home.quickStartHint: In a hurry? Jump straight to the fastest path to your first insights.
home.title: Welcome to Voice of the Customer

onboarding.heading: Welcome — let’s get your feedback flowing
onboarding.subheading: Your workspace is empty. Start by bringing in customer feedback, then explore and analyze it.
onboarding.step1Desc: Connect app store / web scrapers or import a CSV to pull in customer feedback.
onboarding.step2Desc: Create a feedback form and collect responses directly from users.
onboarding.step3Desc: Once data is in, use AI Chat to find trends and turn them into projects.
